title: aipm.toml
description: AI Package Manager configuration file. Only the [workspace.lints] section is validated; all other sections are intentionally unconstrained.

workspace.description: Workspace configuration for multi-package aipm projects.

lints.description: Lint rule configuration. Keys are rule IDs; values are severity overrides or detailed config objects. Unknown rule IDs are rejected.

ignore.description: Global ignore configuration applied to all lint rules.

paths.description: Glob patterns for files or directories to exclude from all lint rules (e.g. "vendor/**", "third_party/**").

items.description: A glob pattern relative to the workspace root.

^(skill/missing-name|skill/missing-descr.description: Override the severity of a lint rule, or suppress it entirely.

oneOf.description: Simple severity override. "allow" suppresses the rule; "warn"/"warning" makes it advisory (exit 0); "error"/"deny" makes it blocking (exit 1).

Detailed rule override: optionally change severity and/or provide per-rule ignore paths. Both fields are optional — omit `level` to keep the rule's default severity while still applying `ignore` paths.

level.description: Severity level for this rule. Omit to keep the rule's default severity while still applying other options (e.g. `ignore`).

ignore.description: Glob patterns to exclude from this specific rule only.

items.description: A glob pattern relative to the workspace root.

^instructions/oversized$.description: Override the severity of the instructions/oversized rule and/or configure its line and character thresholds.

oneOf.description: Simple severity override. "allow" suppresses the rule; "warn"/"warning" makes it advisory (exit 0); "error"/"deny" makes it blocking (exit 1).
Configure instructions/oversized: optionally change severity, adjust size thresholds, enable import resolution, and/or ignore specific paths.

level.description: Severity level for this rule. Omit to keep the default severity while still applying other options.

ignore.description: Glob patterns to exclude from this rule only.

items.description: A glob pattern relative to the workspace root.

lines.description: Maximum number of lines allowed in an instruction file. Default: 100.

characters.description: Maximum number of characters allowed in an instruction file. Default: 15000.

resolve-imports.description: When true, follow @path imports and relative markdown links to compute the total resolved content size. Default: false.
